meta.title: National Security, Privacy, and Renewing the USA PATRIOT Act
meta.description: Representative Mike Pompeo will join former FCC Commissioner and Hudson Senior Fellow Robert McDowell for a conversation on the USA PATRIOT Act. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
